name: Khaadi Ethnic Printed Cotton Kurti
overview_desc: A vibrant, daily-wear kurti featuring traditional block-print motifs.

product_page.description: Crafted from breathable lawn cotton, this straight-cut kurti features a band collar and intricate floral patterns inspired by regional heritage.
product_page.feature_resolution: 100% Breathable Cotton, Color-Fast Fabric, Regular Fit.

reviews.comment: The fabric quality is amazing for the price.

name: Zara Flowy Satin Maxi Dress
overview_desc: An elegant, long-line silhouette with a subtle sheen.

product_page.description: This V-neck maxi dress features thin adjustable straps and a side slit, perfect for summer evenings or vacation wear.
product_page.feature_resolution: Satin Finish, Adjustable Straps, Side Zip.

name: H&M Ribbed Jersey Casual Top
overview_desc: A versatile, soft-ribbed top for effortless layering.

product_page.description: Short-sleeved top in soft organic cotton jersey with a ribbed texture and a slightly fitted silhouette.
product_page.feature_resolution: Organic Cotton, Stretch Fit, Sustainable Materials.

name: Limelight Unstitched 3PC Lawn Suit
overview_desc: A complete summer ensemble with a printed dupatta and shirt.

product_page.description: Includes a printed lawn shirt, dyed trousers, and a lightweight chiffon dupatta with contemporary geometric patterns.
product_page.feature_resolution: High-Quality Lawn, Unstitched, Chiffon Dupatta.

name: Sana Safinaz Muzlin Embroidered Dress
overview_desc: Exquisite embroidery on premium fabric for a sophisticated look.

product_page.description: A luxury lawn shirt featuring heavy threadwork on the neckline and daman, paired with lace-detailed trousers.
product_page.feature_resolution: Intricate Embroidery, Designer Cut, Premium Lawn.

reviews.comment: Beautiful detailing and perfect for events.

name: Khaadi Jacquard Winter Shawl
overview_desc: Warm and cozy wrap with a sophisticated jacquard weave.

product_page.description: Large rectangular shawl crafted from a wool blend, featuring traditional motifs and fringe detailing at the borders.
product_page.feature_resolution: Wool Blend, Oversized, Jacquard Patterns.

name: Zara Sequined Party Dress
overview_desc: A shimmering mini dress designed for night-out glamour.

product_page.description: Round neck dress with long sleeves and sequin appliqués. Features an inner lining for comfort and a back zip closure.
product_page.feature_resolution: Full Sequins, Stretch Lining, Glamorous Cut.

name: H&M Skinny High Waist Jeans
overview_desc: Classic 5-pocket jeans in extra-stretch denim.

product_page.description: High-waisted jeans in washed denim with a tight fit and tapered legs. Features a zip fly and button closure.
product_page.feature_resolution: Super Stretch, High Rise, Sustainable Cotton.

name: Limelight Ready-to-Wear 2PC Suit
overview_desc: A coordinated shirt and trouser set for a polished look.

product_page.description: Pre-stitched cambric cotton set featuring a digital print shirt and matching straight-leg trousers.
product_page.feature_resolution: Ready-to-Wear, Digital Print, Cambric Cotton.

name: Sana Safinaz Luxury Chiffon Formal
overview_desc: A heavy-duty festive dress with hand-worked embellishments.

product_page.description: This formal ensemble features a pure chiffon base with zardozi and kora work. Includes an embroidered dupatta and silk slip.
product_page.feature_resolution: Hand-crafted, Pure Chiffon, Festive Embroidery.

reviews.comment: Absolute perfection for a wedding guest look.

name: Bata Red Label Block Heels
overview_desc: Stylish and stable block heels for all-day comfort.

product_page.description: Features a cushioned footbed and a 2.5-inch block heel. The pointed-toe design adds a professional touch to any outfit.
product_page.feature_resolution: Cushioned Insole, 2.5-inch Heel, Anti-Slip Sole.

name: Servis Be-One Comfort Flats
overview_desc: Lightweight and flexible flats for daily commutes.

product_page.description: Soft synthetic upper with a decorative buckle. These flats offer a snug fit and a durable rubber sole for urban walking.
product_page.feature_resolution: Flexible Sole, Lightweight, Easy Slip-on.

name: Zara Strappy Leather Sandals
overview_desc: Minimalist leather sandals with thin straps and a square toe.

product_page.description: High-quality leather sandals featuring a buckle fastening at the ankle and a flat profile. A timeless summer essential.
product_page.feature_resolution: Genuine Leather, Square Toe, Buckle Fastening.

name: Elegance Pointed Stiletto Pumps
overview_desc: Classic stilettos that offer a sharp and elongated silhouette.

product_page.description: 4-inch stiletto heels with a high-shine finish. Ideal for formal dinners, corporate meetings, and events.
product_page.feature_resolution: 4-inch Heel, Slim Profile, Synthetic Patent Leather.

name: Urban Walk Casual Slip-ons
overview_desc: Breathable mesh slip-ons for walking and leisure.

product_page.description: Memory foam insoles and a flexible mesh upper ensure comfort during long hours of standing or walking.
product_page.feature_resolution: Memory Foam, Breathable Mesh, Machine Washable.

name: J. Quilted Leather Handbag
overview_desc: A structured handbag with a classic quilted pattern.

product_page.description: Features a gold-tone twist-lock closure and a chain-link shoulder strap. Includes multiple internal compartments for organization.
product_page.feature_resolution: Vegan Leather, Gold-tone Hardware, Multi-compartment.

reviews.comment: The quality is comparable to high-end luxury brands.

name: Outfitters Nylon Sling Bag
overview_desc: Sporty and functional sling bag for the urban explorer.

product_page.description: Crafted from durable nylon, this bag features adjustable straps and exterior zip pockets for easy access to essentials.
product_page.feature_resolution: Durable Nylon, Adjustable Strap, Water-resistant.

name: H&M Textured Shoulder Bag
overview_desc: A chic, minimalist bag with a 90s-inspired silhouette.

product_page.description: Small shoulder bag in textured imitation leather with a short handle and a zip at the top. Perfect for evening outings.
product_page.feature_resolution: Textured Finish, Zip Closure, Compact Size.

name: Royal Kundan Jewelry Set
overview_desc: A traditional jewelry set including a necklace and matching earrings.

product_page.description: Gold-plated set with Kundan stones and pearl drops. Perfect for weddings and formal festive events.
product_page.feature_resolution: Gold Plated, Kundan Work, Adjustable Length.

name: Chiffon Floral Printed Scarf
overview_desc: A lightweight, airy scarf to complement any outfit.

product_page.description: Made from soft chiffon, this scarf features delicate floral prints and can be worn in multiple styles.
product_page.feature_resolution: Soft Chiffon, Lightweight, Multi-style.
